subcodes.first_line: O My handmaiden! Say: Glorified art Thou, O my God, O Thou by Whose Name the gate of heaven was opened, and by the movement of Whose finger [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا امتی قولی سبحانک اللهم یا من باسمک فتح باب السماء و باشارة من اصبعک
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for women, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @Manifestation of God as sun
